subject: Re:
body:
I tried this morning ,, call me after 3   , 212 750 9895 I'd love to see the baby.


----- Original Message ----
From: "monicarysko1@aol.com" <monicarysko1@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, June 11, 2007 8:00:25 PM
Subject: 


hi,Jeffrey
how are you?
I really need to talk to you so if you find a minute please call me.
It's worth your time.
Anyways Iwould love see you with my doughter Angelina

I'm waiting for your call 
love, 
old buddy Monica
917-698-3333
